hero.title: Find Your Perfect Student Housing
hero.subtitle: Discover comfortable and affordable housing near your university
hero.searchPlaceholder: Search by city, region, or property name...

howItWorks.title: How it Works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Explore high-quality student housing tailored to your location and budget.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Ensure a harmonious living experience by matching with compatible roommates.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Prioritize your mental health with our intelligent well-being monitoring system.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Navigate roommate challenges effortlessly with AI-powered conflict resolution.

search.title: Search Properties
search.noResults: No properties found matching your criteria

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.placeholder: Ask me anything about finding housing...

problemSolver.title: Student Roommate Matcher
problemSolver.description: Finding the right roommate is the biggest challenge for students. Use our tool to find someone who matches your lifestyle.

results.title: Your Match Score
results.good: You are easy to live with! 👍
results.challenging: You might need a very specific roommate. 🧐

resolver.title: AI Student Problem Solver
resolver.desc: Having trouble with your roommate? Describe the issue for an instant AI strategy.
resolver.placeholder: e.g., My roommate leaves dirty dishes everywhere...

mentalHealth.title: Student MindWell
mentalHealth.description: Your mental well-being is vital. Use our early detection system to monitor your mood and get support when you need it.

quiz.title: Self-Assessment Check-in
quiz.q1: How often have you felt lonely or isolated this week?
quiz.q2: Are you feeling overwhelmed by academic pressure?
quiz.q3: Have you been in contact with family or friends recently?

results.title: Well-being Analysis
results.low: You seem to be doing well! Keep maintaining those healthy connections. 🌟
results.moderate: You're experiencing some pressure. Consider talking to a friend or taking a break. 👍
results.high: You might be feeling isolated. We recommend reaching out for support. You're not alone. 🤝

social.title: Connect & Meet Friends
social.desc: Join student communities and social apps to expand your circle.
social.apps: Try apps like Discord (Student Hubs), Meetup, or Bumble For Friends.

activities.title: Recommended Activities
activities.desc: Engage in these activities to refresh your mind.

academic.title: Academic Focus
academic.desc: Turn pressure into progress with focused learning.
academic.math: Join the Mathematics Study Circle for collaborative problem solving.

resources.title: Support Resources
resources.disclaimer: Note: This is an early detection tool, not a medical diagnosis. If you're in crisis, please seek professional help immediately.

braveRoom.title: Brave Room
braveRoom.desc: An anonymous, safe space to chat with fellow students who understand what you're going through.
braveRoom.joining: Connecting to a peer support partner...

sos.title: You are not alone
sos.desc: Please reach out to our emergency team or call the national hotline immediately.

sleep.title: Sleep Hygiene
sleep.desc: Optimize your recovery with regular sleep patterns.

nutrition.title: Brain Nutrition
nutrition.desc: Foods that support cognitive focus and mood stability.

workshops.title: Wellness Workshops
workshops.desc: Join a group mindfulness session on campus.

challenge.title: Daily Wellness Challenge
challenge.desc: A small step toward a better version of yourself.

detox.title: Digital Detox
detox.desc: Unplug for 30 minutes to reduce mental fatigue.

creative.title: Creative Flow
creative.desc: Doodle, write, or play music to release tension.

pulse.title: Pulse: Breathe to Calm
pulse.desc: Regulate your breathing and lower stress levels in 60 seconds.

glow.title: Daily Glow
glow.desc: Your positive thought for the day. Click to reveal.
list: I am capable of achieving great things today.
My health and peace of mind are my top priorities.
I have the strength to overcome any seasonal pressure.
I am a valuable part of this community.
Every step I take is a step toward my graduation success.
